news.t: Goldman Adds New Active International Equities ETF GIEQ

holdings.infoBox: GIEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 256 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 3.67%, Nestlé at 1.65%, Roche Holding AG at 1.41%, BHP Group at 1.40%, and AstraZeneca at 1.32%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Data Enhanced International Equity ETF (GIEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to provide global equity exposure outside of the US. The fund uses proprietary models and research to construct and manage the portfolio GIEQ was launched on May 19, 2026 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: Goldman Adds New Active International Equities ETF GIEQ
data.text: The ETF ecosystem continues to grow with more and more funds available to investors. Goldman Sachs Asset Management has added the latest ETF to the lot with a new active, data-empowered international ...
